feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Issue in ABAP CDS Views - SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!!

I have created a Data definition with Sales Order and Sales Order Item fields and when I see the output I am getting as below.

But My requirement is to get data as below. 

I require order items grouped with order no. 

Kindly Help.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Configuring Automatic Emails with Multiple CCs
entry.content:
How to configure automatic email with multiple CCs.

entry.title: Process the DCD for released sales orders.
entry.content:
Remove the blocked sales order which is already released from the documented credit decision list.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: UPDATE PAN ON VENDOR MASTER DATA
entry.content:
We are using API to create business partner 'API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner' in the role of supplier fin-accounting . 

The field J_1IPANNO is not available on the API. 

As the integration is flowing online , how can we update this field in the supplier vendor master data on the tab Supplier : country -specific enhancement 

is there any badi, enhancement for public cloud ? 

Thanks 

Ana

entry.title: [R] not possible to upload migration templates via migration cockpit app
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I tried to upload the migration template via migration cockpit app in the sap test system and then i get error message "A system maintenance event is in process. Please try again later. " please check attached screenshot(systemerror)

 

Could you please tell us what's the reason and downtime? when should we have access to upload the file again?

 

Currently we are in the cutover phase and we have to upload the templates to test system first in order to proceed with productive system later.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Authorization for Define Characteristics Groups and Define Class Groups in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Please let us know which catalog or app id should be used to edit the  Define Characteristics Groups and Define Class Groups.

We get an error with "You do not have authorization to change the data" when trying to edit 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Manage Product Master Data component scrap (MARC-KAUSF) is not available.
entry.content:
Hello,

 

In F1602 component scrap (MARC-KAUSF) is not available.

 

If I enter a value in material by using MM02 I cannot see it or manage it in F1602.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Create billing documents from sales orders, not delivery orders
entry.content:
Dear all.

How can I create billing documents from sales orders, not delivery orders in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ?

Kind Regards.

#SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition #SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: When will Standard API - API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV be Deleted
entry.content:
We are using API - API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV.

We are aware this will be discontinued in the future. Is there a timeline on when exactly this API will be discontinued?

entry.title: API Consumption from S4 Hana Cloud Public Edition to SAP Profitability and Performance Management
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm having trouble with API consumption from S4 Hana Cloud PE to a SAP PaPM Cloud tenant.

The APIs in question are: 

Product Master (A2X)
Business Partner (A2X)

I've created a conection between the SAP S4 Hana Cloud and the SAP BTP in which the SAP PaPM Cloud resides. And on s4 hana, I've created a Communication System, and Communication Arrangement. **All inbound*

 

 

And I've configured the connection like this on PaPM

 

 

 

I can see the fields of the API without a problem

 

I map the fields, and after saving, activating and running I get the following error: /NXI/P1_N/104 Error calling oData service destination: S4CtoPaPM; <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><error xmlns

 

 

Also I want to take all the data at once, or get it one by one, like the following example.

 

Thank you in advance with any advice. Hope someone can help me. 

Best Regards

entry.title: Payment Request Clearing Account
entry.content:
Dear Community,

in S/4 Public Cloud, when processing outgoing (supplier) payments, after successfully processed outgoing payment and processed bank statement I/we noticed postings towards account "Payment Request Clearing" which at the moment we cannot explain, meaning from where (in CBC customizing) is this particular account being triggered for our payment scenario - see attachment for details.

Scope Items for Basic Bank Account Management (BFA) and Basic Cash Operations (BFB) are being active.

Kindly advise.

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Best way of regular data download from S4HC to MS SQL Server or Azure server
entry.content:
We are in an implementation stage with ##S4HC Public Cloud and we have a BI system with the previous ERP, which we would like to continue feeding with data from SA

We need regular(daily/weekly) - preferably automated - data extractions of some data (eg. sales, production). The only way way we found so far is with using APIs. This does not seem to be a very efficient way for bigger volume data extraction (lot of overhead with json or xml data format vs. for example csv).

What would be the best way achieving this. We have MS SQL servers in house to store/transform data or at the worst case we can utilize an Azure Server.

Any help or pointers is much appreciated, Thx Attila

entry.title: How to avoid this splitting of invoices in s4hana public cloud dev system
entry.content:
Hi SAP support

We are SAP Public cloud.

We have a requirement at our end to avoid splitting of SD – Billing invoice when the ship to party is different.

How to avoid this splitting of invoices?

Please suggest a solution to the same.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sell from Project Stock in SAP-Public cloud system.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement to sell the material from project stock. We are using item category as 'TAN'

As of now, when we are posting goods issue system is checking the unrestricted stock not project stock. I am looking for the config node - Maintain Item categories (VOV7 in private cloud system) to assign special stock indicator in item category but not able to find the same.

Can anyone please share the node name in SAP S4Hana Public cloud.

Thanks.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Localization

entry.title: Sell from Project Stock in Public cloud system.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement to sell the material from project stock. We are using item category as 'TAN'

As of now, when we are posting goods issue system is checking the unrestricted stock not project stock. I am looking for the config node - Maintain Item categories (VOV7 in private cloud system) to assign special stock indicator in item category but not able to find the same.

Can anyone please share the node name in SAP S4Hana Public cloud or suggest some alternate way to do this.

Thanks

entry.title: Hey, can anyone tell my which scope item describes the serial number creation within the production?
entry.content:
Hello,

 

we want to use serial numbers for finished goods. Unfortunately I cannot find the right scope item which describes the process for serial number creation.

 

Kind regards,
jana

entry.title: How to Consume Sales order A2X RFC BAPI API(SAP_COM_0109) in SAP Public Cloud BADI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to consume Sales order A2X RFC BAPI API(SAP_COM_0109) in ADT to update sales order data for few custom fields created using Business service consumption model in BADI: SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD,

Kindly suggest if this is a plausible approach and please guide on how the service consumption model can be configured and used in SAP Public cloud.

Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: API does not have fields for Quantity and allow effective date
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

Good Day!

 

https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_GLADJMTACCTGNOTIFTP

The above API does not allow to add the field Quantity and a custom field we require.

 

This is a critical field for our solution and reports to derive the billed hours that are being posted by SAP suggested Steampunk solutioning to extension ledger for cash basis accounting, can you please prioritize and update the API to allow to post Quantity and Custom Field for date.

 

 

 

Regards

Vishal Prakash

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Manage Projects with material procurement in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

 

is it possible to manage projects (WBS) with material procurement in S/4 Public Cloud?

Tks

Stefano
